<style id='global-styles-inline-css' type='text/css'>
:root{--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--square: 1;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--4-3: 4/3;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--3-4: 3/4;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--3-2: 3/2;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--2-3: 2/3;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--16-9: 16/9;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--9-16: 9/16;--wp--preset--color--black: #000000;--wp--preset--color--cyan-bluish-gray: #abb8c3;--wp--preset--color--white: #ffffff;--wp--preset--color--pale-pink: #f78da7;--wp--preset--color--vivid-red: #cf2e2e;--wp--preset--color--luminous-vivid-orange: #ff6900;--wp--preset--color--luminous-vivid-amber: #fcb900;--wp--preset--color--light-green-cyan: #7bdcb5;--wp--preset--color--vivid-green-cyan: #00d084;--wp--preset--color--pale-cyan-blue: #8ed1fc;--wp--preset--color--vivid-cyan-blue: #0693e3;--wp--preset--color--vivid-purple: #9b51e0;--wp--preset--gradient--vivid-cyan-blue-to-vivid-purple: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(6,147,227) 0%,rgb(155,81,224) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--light-green-cyan-to-vivid-green-cyan: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(122,220,180) 0%,rgb(0,208,130) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--luminous-vivid-amber-to-luminous-vivid-orange: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(252,185,0) 0%,rgb(255,105,0) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--luminous-vivid-orange-to-vivid-red: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(255,105,0) 0%,rgb(207,46,46) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--very-light-gray-to-cyan-bluish-gray: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(238,238,238) 0%,rgb(169,184,195) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--cool-to-warm-spectrum: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(74,234,220) 0%,rgb(151,120,209) 20%,rgb(207,42,186) 40%,rgb(238,44,130) 60%,rgb(251,105,98) 80%,rgb(254,248,76) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--blush-light-purple: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(255,206,236) 0%,rgb(152,150,240) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--blush-bordeaux: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(254,205,165) 0%,rgb(254,45,45) 50%,rgb(107,0,62) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--luminous-dusk: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(255,203,112) 0%,rgb(199,81,192) 50%,rgb(65,88,208) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--pale-ocean: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(255,245,203) 0%,rgb(182,227,212) 50%,rgb(51,167,181) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--electric-grass: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(202,248,128) 0%,rgb(113,206,126) 20px;--wp--preset--font-size--large: 36px;--wp--preset--font-size--x-large: 42px;--wp--preset--spacing--20: 0.44rem;--wp--preset--spacing--30: 0.67rem;--wp--preset--spacing--40: <body class="home wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-638442 wp-theme-adevinta-theme">

<header
	id="site-header"
	role="banner">
	<div id="skip-to-content" class="skip-links"><a href="#main-content">Directly to content</a></div>
		<div class="container menu-center">
		<div class="header__logo">
			<a
				href="https://adevinta.com"
				class="header__logo-link"
				aria-label="Adevinta logo - Link to homepage">

<main
	id="main-content"
	role="main">
<div class="block hero hero--bg-primary hero--bg-type--image hero--bg-image-right">
	<div class="container">
		<div class="hero__content">
			
			
			<h1>Changing Commerce <em>Together</em></h1>
<div>Adevinta is a leading online classifieds group and champion for sustainable commerce across Europe and beyond. With digital marketplaces across many countries, our portfolio spans consumer goods, mobility, real estate, holiday rentals and jobs. Together, our marketplaces attract more than 120 million users every month and over a million businesses.</div>
<div></div>

					</div>

					<div class="hero__bg-image-wrapper">

<div class="block big-text-block">
	<div class="big-text">
		<div class="container">
			<div class="big-text__content">
									<h2 data-start="130" data-end="188">Connecting People and Businesses across <em><strong>Europe and Beyond</strong></em></h2>
<p>We exist to help everything and everyone find a new purpose. We do this by creating perfect matches through our internationally connected and locally loved marketplaces.</p>
													<a
						href="https://adevinta.com/brands/"
						class="button-ghost-light">
						Read more about our local brands					</a>
													<p>
						
					</p>
							</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>



	<section class="logobar">
		<ul class="logobar__list">
							<li class="logobar__list-item">

							<li class="logobar__list-item">
					<img decoding="async" width="843" height="192" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" class="logobar__list-item-image ewww_webp" alt="" srcset="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw== 1w" data-src-img="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White.png" data-src-webp="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White.png.webp" data-srcset-webp="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White.png.webp 843w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-300x68.png.webp 300w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-768x175.png.webp 768w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-500x114.png.webp 500w" data-srcset-img="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White.png 843w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-300x68.png 300w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-768x175.png 768w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-500x114.png 500w" data-eio="j" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="843" height="192" src="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White.png" class="logobar__list-item-image" alt="" srcset="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White.png 843w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-300x68.png 300w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-768x175.png 768w, https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Truckscorner-White-500x114.png 500w" /></noscript>				</li>
							<li class="logobar__list-item">
					<img decoding="async" width="286" height="192" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" class="logobar__list-item-image ewww_webp" alt="" data-src-img="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Kijiji-White-copy.png" data-src-webp="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Kijiji-White-copy.png.webp" data-eio="j" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="286" height="192" src="https://adevinta.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Kijiji-White-copy.png" class="logobar__list-item-image" alt="" /></noscript>				</li>
					</ul>
		<button
			class="logobar__button"
			aria-pressed="false"
			aria-label="Pause logobar animation"
			data-animation="true">
			<span class="logobar__button-icon"></span>
		</button>
	</section>

	<div class="container">
		<div class="content-pixels-images__wrapper">

<script type="text/javascript">
/* <![CDATA[ */
	var relevanssi_rt_regex = /(&|\?)_(rt|rt_nonce)=(\w+)/g
	var newUrl = window.location.search.replace(relevanssi_rt_regex, '')
	if (newUrl.substr(0, 1) == '&') {
		newUrl = '?' + newUrl.substr(1)
	}
	history.replaceState(null, null, window.location.pathname + newUrl + window.location.hash)
/* ]]> */
</script>

/* ]]> */
</script>
